Functional reference to the card account for display purposes, visible to the customer

Attribute description (EN): Functional reference for a card account bundle for display purposes
Technical reference to the contract associated with this card account

Attribute description (EN): Functional reference to the contract for display purposes
Identifier for the legal issuer of cards in this account; organization responsible towards card schemes for rule compliance
Name of the legal issuer organization
Identifier for the organization distributing/selling cards to end customers; empty if distributed directly by issuer
Name of the distribution partner organization; empty if distributed directly by issuer
List of card identifiers (cardId) associated with this card account

Attribute description (EN): Settlement currency of the card account in which transactions are billed
International Bank Account Number linked to the card account; mainly relevant for debit cards, optional for credit/prepaid
Frequency of billing cycles for statement generation (e.g., monthly, quarterly).
Comment:
- Nur Rhythmus angeben oder auch konkreten Tag? --> tendenziell beides
- Welcher Wert wird für Prepaid und Debit verwendet? Ggf. Attribut optional machen --> spezieller Wert für Debit
- UCC: nur monthly verfügbar
- Abzustimmen ob es notwendig ist oder eh immer "monthly" angewendet wird in der Praxis --> notwendig

Attribute description (EN):
Day of the month when the billing cycle usually closes and the statement is generated.
Not used by all issuers.
Comment: - Für Debit und Prepaid 0 eingeführt

Attribute description (EN): Current operational status of the card account (active, suspended, blocked)
Comment:
- Einfaches Statuskonzept wie für Card auf Level 1? --> evtl. vereinfachen zu nur "active" und "blocked" --> bei UCC ist suspended möglich und deshalb hier aufnehmen
- Viseca: verifizieren ob suspended Status auch auf Konto möglich ist

Attribute description (EN): Identifier for the loyalty program associated with this account (if applicable)
Comment: - Abbildung von Debit zu diskutieren --> kein Problem, optionales Feld, kann weggelassen werden

Attribute description (EN): Name of the loyalty program
Reference identifier for the customer's participation in the loyalty program
Date when the customer enrolled in the loyalty program
Date when the loyalty program participation was cancelled (if applicable)

Method used for settlement of the open balance.
direct_debit: used for lsv, debit_direct and other automatic debiting
ipi used for international payments and if account is in non-CHF currency
debit: used for debit cards
Comment:
- Wert für Debit und Prepaid zu definieren oder Attribut optional machen --> debit als explizierter Wert
- direct_debit: lsv, debit_direct, u.a.
- Viseca: POS noch in Anwendung? --> nein

Attribute description (EN):
Payment modality selected by the customer (e.g., full payment, instalment, revolving).
full is used also for debit cards and prepaid cards
Comment: - Wert für Debit und Prepaid zu definieren oder Attribut optional machen --> full wird verwendet

Attribute description (EN):
Format and delivery method for account statements (e.g., paper, paperless, ebill)
paperless is used for electronic delivery outside ebill
Comment: - Wert für Debit und Prepaid zu definieren oder Attribut optional machen --> debit als explizierter Wert

Attribute description (EN):
Date when the next billing statement will be generated and issued.
Not used by all issuers.

Attribute description (EN): Commercial name of the card account product assigned by the issuer

- verschieben auf card-accounts

Attribute description (EN): Type of card account product (credit, debit, prepaid)

Attribute description (EN): Customer segment to which the card is offered
Comment:

- Fachlich auf Kontoebene, aber wegen Bedarf von API Nutzern auch auf Entität Card

Attribute description (EN): Sum of any booked transactions, for debit cards the sum of the current calendar month
Sum of pending transactions, for debit cards the sum of the current calendar month
Sum of open bill amount from previous cycle (only for credit cards)
Identifier for the cardAccount that is defined by an external system

Attribute description (EN): Technical reference to a person/cardholder, used as unique identifier for API calls to retrieve person details
Functional reference to a person/cardholder for display purposes
Preferred language of the cardholder for all communication (ISO 639-1 two-letter code)
Type of person entity (individual/private, company/business)
Last name of the person (for individuals) or company name (for business entities)
Identifier for the person that is defined by an external system

Attribute description (EN): First name of the person, only used for individuals.
List of card identifiers (cardId) owned by this person and accessible with the provided consent.
List of card account identifiers associated with this person and accessible with the provided consent.
List of contract identifiers associated with this person and accessible with the provided consent.
Unique identifier for the billing statement document
Date when the statement was generated and issued to the customer
Reference to the card account for which this statement was created
Functional reference to the card account for display purposes, visible to the customer
Account balance at the beginning of the statement period
Account balance at the end of the statement period; represents the amount due
Interest amount due on the previous statement; positive values: Soll Zinsen; negative values: Haben Zinsen
For prepaid and debit 0 will be provided
Optional for prepaid cards
Currency in which the statement amounts are provided
First calendar day for which transactions are included in the statement
Last calendar day for which transactions are included in the statement

Method used for settlement of the open balance.
direct_debit: used for lsv, debit_direct and other automatic debiting
ipi used for international payments and if account is in non-CHF currency
debit: used for debit cards
Comment:
- Abruf Informationen für Bezahlung der Rechnung als separater Endpunkt: GET v1/statements/{statement_id}/paymentinstructions
- endpoint will return 404 for debit cards or other cases when no payment is necessary, API consumer can derive this from the account payment_type

Attribute description (EN):
Payment modality selected by the customer (e.g., full payment, instalment, revolving).
full is used also for debit cards and prepaid cards
Contents for the Swiss QR code standard of the payment instructions, can be rendered into a QR code representation
International Bank Account Number on which the amount due on the statement has to be paid. Only relevant for credit and prepaid cards.
Reference data that has to be used for the payment of the statement
Name of the bank (client) that is receiving the money for the statement, usually the issuer
Comment: Data format aligned to ISO20022

Attribute description (EN): Name of the street where the recipient has the official business location
Building number where the recipient has the official business location.
Name of the city / town where the recipient has the official business location.
Postal code for the town where the recipient has the official business location.
Country where the recipient has the official business location.
Bank identifier code for the institution that manages the bank account on which the statement is paid.
Statement document in a Base64 encoded audit-proof pdf format.
Comment:
- Abruf PDF als separater Endpunkt: GET v1/statements/{statement_id}/document
- Anforderung an PDF, dass es revisionssicher ist: signiert, PDF/A
- Base64 encoded Dokument

Unique identifier for the contract, defined by the Card Service Provider

List of card account bundles associated with this contract.
Technical reference to a person/cardholder, used as unique identifier for API calls to retrieve person details
Functional reference to a person/cardholder for display purposes

Identifier for the legal issuer of a card; responsible towards the schemes for keeping the rules

Attribute description (EN): Name of the legal issuer of a card
